reviews.comment:
Buen lugar para descansar y esperar por el cruce a Chile. Última estación de servicio antes del límite con internacional. Camping, baños, servicompras, combustible, plaza y estacionamiento para pasar la noche

(Translated by Google)
Good place to rest and wait for the crossing into Chile. Last gas station before the international border. Camping, restrooms, convenience store, fuel, plaza, and overnight parking.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/829312115577397471/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzczh5ZnRnRRAB

reviews.comment:
La verdad, una mala experiencia con los playeros. Me cargan combustible y cuando me dan el vuelto, me entregan un billete en malas condiciones. Le pido si pueden cambiarlo y se empiezan a reír entre ellos y hacer gestos, después de insistir, entre risas me lo cambian. La verdad el ACA no debería contratar gente de tan poca moral e irrespetuosa.

(Translated by Google)
Honestly, I had a bad experience with the gas station attendants. They pumped my gas, and when they gave me my change, it was a damaged bill. I asked if they could exchange it, and they started laughing and making faces. After I insisted, they finally exchanged it, still laughing. The ACA (Automobile Club of Argentina) really shouldn't hire such unethical and disrespectful people.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/829312115577397471/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzOEl2d05nEAE
